violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

sampleNodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.54 (foreground color: #888888, background color: #ffffff, font size: 13.5pt (18px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

violations.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
violations.help: Heading levels should only increase by one

Fix any of the following:

violations.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
violations.help: Main landmark should not be contained in another landmark

sampleNodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The main landmark is contained in another landmark.

violations.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
violations.help: Document should not have more than one main landmark

sampleNodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one main landmark

violations.help: Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

sampleNodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The landmark must have a unique aria-label, aria-labelledby, or title to make landmarks distinguishable

violations.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
violations.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

sampleNodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.77:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #267372, surrounding text: #212529)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

violations.description: Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
violations.help: Zooming and scaling must not be disabled

sampleNodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  user-scalable=no on <meta> tag disables zooming on mobile devices
